free_text: A study of the mechanism of the reaction
19F(alpha,t)20Ne  at Ealpha=30.3 MeV
- English transl.
Three dE-E telescopes of silicon detectors
with the thicknesses of 100-200 mu-m and 1.5-2 mm,
correspondingly, were used for particle detection. An
angle resolution of the telescopes was +- 1 degr. for
differential cross section measurements and +-3.5 degr.
for double differential cross section measurements.
Error of absolute cross section
No information about source of uncertainty
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
Subent 004 was split in three.
Teflon film with the thickness of 5.5 um was used as
a target.
